content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Feb 21, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today saw the opening of two new pull requests, focusing on integrating new plugins: `@elizaos/plugin-xproof` and `micronoise-eliza-plugin`. Discussions continued on the MoltBridge integration proposal, with an update on its live status and available resources.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
Two new pull requests were opened today, both proposing the addition of new plugins to the registry:
- A new feature to add the `@elizaos/plugin-xproof` plugin was initiated [#266](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/266).
- Another pull request was opened to add the `micronoise-eliza-plugin`, which facilitates token swaps via x402 payments [#265](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/265).

## CLOSED ISSUES

## NEW ISSUES

## ACTIVE ISSUES
**MoltBridge Integration Proposal**
Discussion continued on the integration proposal for MoltBridge as an ElizaOS Plugin [#6501](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6501). An update was provided, confirming that MoltBridge is now live and available for integration. Key resources highlighted include their API (`api.moltbridge.ai`), Node SDK (`@moltbridge/sdk`), MCP server (`@moltbridge/mcp-server`), and an A2A agent card. Specific benefits for Eliza agents were outlined, such as registering for cryptographic identity, querying trust scores, and building reputation through attestations. The update also mentioned an ongoing onboarding program for founding agents.
